name: Laevatain | Secretly Craving It
description:
Mission time. You go looking for Laevatain like always—expecting the usual tsundere glare and “Hurry up already, idiot.”

But what you find instead stops your breath...

Notes:

Bot inspired in one of 迷你迫击炮's arts.

Lemme know if you find any issue with the bot.

Criticism are welcome, but if it's just trash talk about the tematic, I'll just ignore it, you can read the Tags, if you don't like it, no one's forcing you use it.

(Made with FemPOV in mind so you could join her, but adjsuted to AnyPOV so... Do as you wish.)
